data.summary: Insufficient evidence to validate the requirement for the strike system.
data.assessment: The exploratory step requires validation of the strike system, specifically that three strikes result in suspension. However, the evidence provided does not include any concrete API reads or checks that confirm this requirement is satisfied. The linked use case mentions the strike system but lacks specific evidence of its implementation or tracking mechanism, leading to an inconclusive validation.
gaps: No evidence of the strike system implementation or tracking mechanism.

deterministicFollowUps.title: Add deterministic evidence contract
deterministicFollowUps.assertion: Define concrete endpoint calls and assertions that directly verify the strike system requirement.
